title: anthurium × cultorum
intro: Anthurium × cultorum, also known as the Flamingo Flower or Lady's Breath, is a popular ornamental plant species that belongs to the Arum family. The plant is known for its long-lasting heart-shaped flowers, which are often used in floral arrangements due to their vibrant colors and unique shape. Anthurium × cultorum has medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions, while also promoting overall health and well-being.
